violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Finish sealing all raw wood surfaces inside unit.
Plumbing system. — --Must provide a freshwater container to supply water for handwashing. Can be gravity fed but must have warm water.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Ceiling is rough and not fully sealed to be easy to clean.
